TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Vic_Bartolome, title = Vic_Bartolome, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vic_Bartolome} }

S.FORM: Vic Bartolome sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1948, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 9, Vic Bartolome, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Vic Bartolome sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1948, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 9, Vic Bartolome, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *iʦ~ʨ βartolome s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *iʦ~ʨ βartolome, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
